data.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): Clarify creation mechanism — use acli_client.set_relationship(source_jira_key, target_jira_key, link_type='Relates') for link creation. get_issue_link_types() is for validation only (confirm 'Relates' exists in this Jira instance). get_issue_links() is for pre-create dedup only. set_relationship is the sole creation path.
